message:
feat(fwc): add PackageArtifactSource validation and demo source rejection

Introduce PackageArtifactSource enum distinguishing real sources
(LocalDirectory, Registry, MeshBundle, OfflinePrepared) from test-only
sources (DemoFixture, StubPlaceholder). Add validate_package_source()
that rejects demo/stub sources on runtime install/update paths with
informative DemoSourceRejection errors. Add DEMO_MARKERS constant and
contains_demo_marker() for detecting synthetic artifacts by content.

Key invariants enforced:
- No demo/stub source ever validates for install or update commands
- All real sources validate for all runtime commands
- Rejections include informative reason and actionable next_actions
- Known demo markers (fixture-connector, PLACEHOLDER, deadbeef, etc.)
  are detected even without explicit DemoFixture tagging

Adds 24 new tests covering tag stability, serde round-trips, runtime
acceptability, validation logic, rejection payloads, demo markers,
and cross-cutting no-demo-on-runtime invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
